contact_p_18: Share with us what you need (function) and what you love (theme), and we'll help you find the designed product that will integrate perfectly into your home. Whether you're looking for designed bookends for the home, unique phone stands, or specially designed kitchen accessories – we're here for you.
contact_p_19: We'll suggest exactly the product that fits your style and needs, whether it's a function you want to fulfill or a space you want to design.
contact_p_20: Each product comes with simple and clear installation instructions, so you can enjoy your new item easily and confidently.
contact_p_21: We're here to answer any question, recommend special gifts, and ensure you receive personal and warm service.
contact_p_22: We'd love to hear from you and assist with any question. We'll get back to you as soon as possible with professional and dedicated service.
contact_p_23: So we can give you the most accurate response, please share the following details with us:
contact_p_24: Type of room or space (living room, office, bedroom, children's room, entrance hall)
contact_p_26: Preferred theme / dedicated gift for whom
contact_p_27: Dimensions and space limitations (width, height, depth)
contact_p_29: We'd be happy to answer any question and help you find the perfect product/gift. We usually respond within 24 hours on business days. Our studio is located in Sharon.
contact_p_31:
Follow us on Facebook and Instagram for updates on new product launches and home design inspiration.

https://www.facebook.com/artoridesignisrael
https://www.instagram.com/artori_design
contact_p_32: Our studio is located in Sharon and from here come all our original designs. We ship throughout the country using reliable delivery services, and we also invite you to pick up with self-collection if you prefer. We'd be happy to help you find the perfect product for your home design or to give as a gift.
contact_p_33: Share your preferences with us – what function interests you, and what theme speaks to you. We'd be happy to help you find the perfect product for your home.

our_story_p_22: We believe that functional home products can tell a story and give character and personality to our living space. Each of our items is carefully created to combine utility with aesthetic and meaningful design. Our products are characterized by an original approach and perspective on the function they need to implement, and they are always integrated with humor, originality, taking out of the conventional context and aesthetics.
our_story_p_23: Every product we create comes from a deep commitment to three core principles: functional clarity that makes every item comfortable and practical for daily use, a frame story that brings character, interest and a smile to your living space, and long-term durability that ensures our products will serve you for many years.
our_story_p_24: Most of our products are first designed to meet a real need in the home: hangers, storage shelves, bookends, mobile phone holders, key shelves and small items for the entrance hall - all precisely adapted to a specific function and specific space in the house. For products that are functional, we start with functionality and only then add the design, so that each item will work perfectly in your daily life. In addition, we have products that are purely decorative - they too have functional clarity - they perfectly decorate your space.
our_story_p_25: Your home is where you express yourself, and our products help you do that. Love superheroes? Your bookshelf can reflect that. Love cats? We'll make sure it's impossible to miss. Love humor? You can broadcast it from every corner of the house with objects that catch the eye and bring a smile. Each product tells a small story and adds color and interest to your daily routine.
our_story_p_26: We don't believe in disposable products. Each item undergoes a meticulous manufacturing process with quality materials, precise finishes and strong construction. Our goal is that the product you buy today will continue to serve you for many years to come. This is good for both you and the environment.
our_story_p_27:
The idea stage: Every product we design and create comes from a different place. It can be an upgrade of a simple everyday product that we used that gave us an idea to improve it, beautify it or turn it into something more interesting, funny and thought-provoking. It can be an idea that comes from a picture we saw, a scene from a movie or from the street, there are no rules. The mind works 24 hours a day, even in dreams.. Product ideas can pop up while driving, in the shower, while running. You just need to stop and write it down, because even good ideas sometimes slip away and are forgotten..

The design process: After consolidating the initial idea, a process of deepening and development begins through brainstorming aimed at examining different directions and sharpening the concept. At this stage it is customary to share with friends or focus groups, to receive opinions, ratings and comments that can improve the product even before full development. Later, computer simulations are created using advanced graphic tools, which allow for precise shape, functionality and aesthetics. The product design process also includes color and material selection and attention to user experience. Finally, tests are performed to ensure that the product meets expectations, both in terms of design and in terms of usability and quality.
our_story_p_28:
Of course you don't have to.. but in our approach, a product can both answer the function for which it exists and also be something that's fun to look at, funny or thought-provoking. When it's like that - it's much more fun to use. We strive for our products to be ones that are fun to purchase for yourself or your loved ones. A designed product with added value also testifies to you and to whom you give it as a gift. Our products tell a story, make functional, everyday use more pleasant and bring a smile. We love to put soul into everyday objects, to make them ones that are fun to look at even when they're not in use.. 
And sometimes you don't need to explain.. you need to let the products speak for themselves..
our_story_p_29: If you love to surprise and be original, love humor and modern design, love blue and white design that speaks our language and is also sold all over the world.. this is the place.
our_story_p_30: Most of our products come ready for immediate use without the need for installation. The bookends stand by themselves on the shelf, the shelves and hangers come with quality screws and dowels for easy wall installation, the cats are supplied with strong and quality double-sided adhesive that can be removed without traces. Each product comes with simple installation instructions, and you can always contact us for personal advice.
our_story_p_31: Our products are made from quality and durable materials. For routine cleaning of metal products, simply use a soft, damp cloth. Silicone products are suitable for dishwasher cleaning. We recommend avoiding abrasive or aggressive cleaning materials to maintain the original finish for years.
our_story_p_32:
We recommend browsing the site for your enjoyment, both by category and need or functionality, and also in a completely random way. 
We're sure something will catch your eye, excite you and sharpen a need or just a desire you didn't think about, or maybe remind you of someone dear you'd like to make happy because this or that product is "tailor-made" for them. If you're into pampering yourself and dressing up your home - you've come to the right place! Scan all the rooms of the house in your imagination while thinking about what fits with the design of each and every room. Where some touch is missing that will upgrade. We are always available for personal consultation.
our_story_p_33: Our products combine love for a particular subject with sophisticated and restrained design. The superheroes, cats, human figures of the phone stands and more are designed as silhouettes, in a minimalist style, with clean lines that integrate with any home design style. It's not a "toy" but a real design item that expresses personality. The result is a product that tells a story but remains elegant and suitable for both a designed living room and a professional office.
our_story_p_34: Our products are manufactured from quality and durable raw materials and painted with quality and durable colors. With regular use and basic maintenance, the products can last for many years. However, you can always contact us regarding defects because we provide full warranty on every product.
our_story_p_35: Absolutely! Our products are a perfect gift for anyone who loves unique design and smart functionality. It's a gift that combines personal attention (choosing a theme that suits the recipient) with daily usability. We have in our collection dedicated gifts for doctors for example, for soldiers, for caregivers, for teachers and this is constantly updated according to market demands. We offer special gifts suitable for holidays, birthdays, housewarming, or simply to surprise someone dear with something special that will serve them every day. When you choose a gift from our product line, you can be sure that you are original and surprising and that the gift you gave will be talked about, remembered and reminded.
our_story_p_36: Home design items and gifts with character that bring warmth, interest and humor to any living space

collections_h2_1: Furnishing Every Room in the House / Office
collections_p_30: Tell us who you'd like to surprise and we'll suggest perfect ideas.
collections_p_31: Gifts for women that combine design, emotion and style - unique items for home and everyday life. The perfect gift with a personal statement and design touch.
collections_p_32: Designer gifts for men with a twist - functional items with a design wink. Perfect for those who appreciate practicality, humor and smart design.
collections_p_33: Original gifts for couples with unique design - like a pair of Lovebirds for shelf decoration or a set of two bookends - superhero and superheroine or a set of two floating bookshelves - for him and her, to hang on both sides of the bed. Perfect for loving couples, power couples and couples who love design.
collections_p_34: Holiday gifts with a design statement - special items for the table, kitchen and home. Original gifts that add festivity and style to any hosting.
collections_p_35: Invited to a housewarming? Here you'll find designer items that bring character, fun and warmth to any new space. Original gifts for the home with presence. A gift that will remind them of you every time they look at it in their space.
collections_p_36: Office items that will upgrade any desk. Clocks or decorations for wall hanging. Sophisticated, practical and inspiring shelf decorations. Perfect products for upgrading your work environment or as gifts for friends, employees or clients.
collections_p_37: Designer gifts for doctors and medical staff upon successful treatment completion or for any other occasion. Functional items with presence that upgrade any office or clinic and bring a smile.
collections_p_38: Unique gifts for psychologists and therapists - design with an intellectual wink and gentle humor. Perfect thank you gifts for your therapist upon successful treatment completion. For a clinic that appreciates depth and style.
collections_p_39: Who hasn't been stuck without a gift idea for teachers and teaching staff? We've got you covered with thoughtful and clean design. Perfect gift for end of year, holidays or any opportunity to say thank you. A special gift that will be remembered.
collections_p_40: Cute and original gifts for children - designer items that spark imagination and curiosity. A combination of fun, creativity and special design that suits parents too 🙂
collections_p_41: Do you share our cat scratches? Looking for a gift for dog lovers? Designer items with a humorous and warm touch. Perfect for 4-legged enthusiasts who want to combine their love with their home design.
collections_p_42: Designer items with a playful and nostalgic twist, explosive power and hidden superpowers. Perfect for those who love design with character and cultural wink.
collections_p_43: Gifts for boss that combine style, humor and elegance. Designer items that express appreciation in an original and sophisticated way - without being banal.
collections_p_44: Original and designer gifts at an accessible price - functional and beautiful items suitable for any occasion and purpose, because you can surprise with style even on a small budget!
collections_p_45: Gifts for soldiers - small items with great meaning. Perfect for pampering, encouragement and a little smile from home, with a special design touch.
collections_p_46: Home design items and gifts with character that bring warmth, interest and humor to any living space

legal_accessibility_p_10:
We believe in equal rights and in every person's right to receive information and services independently and equally. 
            This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.
